title: Glossary :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
Guardianship, stewardship, trusteeship and trustee.
The official Indonesian family registration document.
Customs, protocols or rules that guide cultural practices particularly on a marae or wharenui .
People who can influence an organisation's compliance with employment and immigration law, including directors of a company, partners in a partnership, and school principals.
Repeating koru that turns back on itself, symbolising self-reflection, nurturing and flourishing.
A loop or coil of a fern.
